data.title: JustLend DAO TVL surpasses $6.71 billion mark
data.description: According to official news, JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, has surpassed $6.71 billion in total value locked (TVL) and has over 480,000 users in its latest weekly report. As a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO is demonstrating the vibrant energy of the DeFi market with its strong performance, providing efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: JustLend DAO Reports Significant Growth in Total Value Locked
data.description: The latest weekly report from JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, reveals that the platform's total value locked has surpassed $6.71 billion, with user numbers exceeding 480,000. According to ChainCatcher, JustLend DAO serves as a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, showcasing robust growth and vitality in the DeFi market. The platform continues to offer efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: GamePad, an AI-native intelligent DeFi infrastructure, is about to launch its mainnet.
data.description: GamePad, an AI-native DeFi infrastructure, is reportedly launching its mainnet in Q1 2026. It will open early access channels globally, providing community members from different countries and regions with opportunities to enter the ecosystem and participate in network operation verification. Currently, GamePad has established strategic partnerships with several industry institutions, advancing preparations for the mainnet launch through technical integration and ecosystem collaboration. Related assets will gradually enter the circulation and application phases according to the established plan. Simultaneously, the project has deployed a system-level operational support mechanism to ensure the stability of liquidity scheduling and risk management in long-term operation scenarios, providing support for price discovery and basic liquidity formation during the mainnet operation phase. GamePad is an AI-native infrastructure built for the long-term operation of decentralized finance, adopting an AI-Native architecture design. It incorporates a built-in computing power scheduling system and an Agent continuous operation engine to serve the continuous operation needs of on-chain transaction execution, risk calculation, and intelligent strategies. Previously, the project has received investment from institutions including OKX and Enjin.

data.title: An address has placed a bet of nearly $100,000 on California passing a one-time wealth tax for billionaires in the 2026 election.
data.description: According to The Poly Nerd, a new address (drop126) invested $99,954 to buy the "YES" option in the Polymarket prediction market for "California will pass a one-time wealth tax for billionaires in the 2026 election," at a price of $0.45. If the prediction is accurate, the address will receive $222,120, making a profit of $122,166.

data.title: Mirae Asset Global Investments increased its holdings in MSTR by 87,000 shares, valued at $14.1 million.
data.description: Mirae Asset Global Investments, with $729 billion in assets under management, has increased its holdings in Bitcoin Treasury Strategy (MSTR) to 87,531 shares, worth $14.1 million. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: Strategies for Protecting Capital in Latin America Amid Inflation and Currency Volatility
data.description: A recent webinar highlighted strategies for investors in Latin America to safeguard their capital against inflation and currency fluctuations through cryptocurrency investments. According to NS3.AI, the event underscored the importance of capital preservation and liquidity, advising investors to carefully evaluate platforms and balance flexible and fixed investment plans. Experts stressed the significance of diversification, setting realistic return expectations, and engaging in informed, gradual participation to navigate volatile markets effectively.

data.title: OKX Card officially launched in Europe, pushing stablecoin payments into everyday scenarios.
data.description: According to official sources, OKX Card has officially launched in Europe. This product aims to integrate on-chain payments into daily life within a compliant framework, supporting users to make purchases using stablecoins and enabling real-time conversion, simplifying traditional payment processes and improving payment efficiency. OKX stated that OKX Card, centered on stablecoins and designed for real-world payment scenarios, aims to promote a more convenient and efficient payment experience and further explore the practical application value of stablecoins in the global financial system.

data.title: CZ: We have recently been subjected to organized attacks, with multiple unknown accounts copying and pasting the same content.
data.description: On January 28, Binance founder CZ posted on social media that there were signs of organized attacks surrounding his recent statements. CZ mentioned that several previously unfamiliar accounts had posted highly similar content in a short period, exhibiting clear characteristics of copying and amplification, suggesting a more systematic approach than natural discussion. The topic continues to circulate in the community.

data.title: Tether launches US₮: the new regulated stablecoin for the US market
data.description:
Tether announces USA₮, a dollar-pegged, GENIUS Act-compliant stablecoin issued by a US federal bank. The move marks a direct entry into the US financial system and a challenge to USDC.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/stablecoins/tether-launches-ust-the-new-regulated-stablecoin-for-the-us-market/

data.title: A whale holding $135 million worth of ETH withdrew 29,665 ETH from OKX.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0x0C4...63f9) withdrew 29,665 ETH from OKX, worth $89.1 million. This address currently holds 44,774 ETH, with a total value of $135 million. In addition, an ETH staker withdrew 3,207 ETH from Gemini for staking, worth $9.64 million.

data.title: Aave Dominates DeFi Lending Market with 51.5% Share
data.description:
Aave has established a strong presence in the DeFi lending market, capturing 51.5% of the sector. According to NS3.AI, this dominance has created a concentrated liquidity hub that drives systemic feedback loops. The protocol operates with significant leverage, evidenced by a borrowed-to-total value locked (TVL) ratio of 71%. It relies on a relatively modest $460 million backstop to absorb potential losses.

Despite successfully managing recent liquidation stress, Aave's system remains vulnerable to tail risks. These include correlated asset shocks, liquidity challenges, and the possibility of rapid deleveraging that could exceed current safeguards. As the DeFi landscape continues to evolve, Aave's position and strategies will be crucial in navigating these potential risks.

data.title: Solana network sees daily new token creation at an 11-month high.
data.description: SolanaFloor stated on the X platform that Memecoin popularity on the Solana chain has rebounded, with daily new token creation reaching its highest level in 11 months. All core metrics, including launch platform transaction volume and active addresses, have reached new highs.

data.title: Binance announces Zama (ZAMA) presale details: Each Binance Wallet user can subscribe up to 3 BNB.
data.description: Binance has announced the details of the Zama (ZAMA) Prime presale: - Each Binance Wallet user can subscribe to a maximum of 3 BNB. - Users will receive their ZAMA Key (BSC) after the presale ends. - The actual ZAMA tokens (BSC) will be airdropped to your Binance Alpha account on TGE day. Important Note: Users who subscribe to ZAMA Keys during the presale will receive an additional token for every token subscribed, effectively doubling the allocation. The additional token will be distributed on TGE day.

data.title: Retail Investors Shift Focus from Cryptocurrencies to Precious Metals
data.description:
Retail investors are increasingly turning their attention and capital from cryptocurrencies to precious metals such as gold and silver. According to NS3.AI, this shift comes as gold and silver reach all-time highs, while the market capitalization of cryptocurrencies, particularly stablecoins, experiences a decline. This trend indicates a risk-off sentiment among investors, who are seeking safe-haven assets amid prevailing uncertainty.

Analysts caution that the heightened excitement and fear of missing out (FOMO) surrounding silver could signal a market peak. Forecasts suggest that silver may reach its peak between February and May, prompting investors to remain vigilant about potential market fluctuations.

data.title: OpenEden Foundation Launches Governance System
data.description: OpenEden Foundation has announced the official launch of its governance system. According to Foresight News, the governance will be implemented in phases. In the initial phase, proposals will be submitted by the OpenEden Foundation, allowing community members to engage through discussion and voting. As the governance system evolves, the ability to submit proposals will gradually be extended to the community.

data.title: Binance Futures to Delist Multiple USDⓈ-M Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Binance Futures has announced plans to delist several USDⓈ-M perpetual contracts. According to BWEnews, the delisting is scheduled to take place on January 30, 2026. This move is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to optimize its offerings and ensure a streamlined trading experience for its users. Traders are advised to manage their positions accordingly before the delisting date to avoid any potential disruptions. Further details on the specific contracts to be delisted have not been disclosed.

data.title: ZEC Short Position Reopened with Leverage
data.description:
On January 28, a notable address known for its significant short positions in ZEC has reopened its short position, according to BlockBeats. The address, identified as 0xd475..., has established a new ZEC short position with a 5x leverage, totaling approximately 2,822 ZEC. The average opening price for this position is $391, and it is currently experiencing a slight floating loss. As of the time of reporting, the address continues to increase its short position.

This address gained recognition for its large-scale short positions in ZEC, having previously started shorting ZEC at a price of $184. During that period, it experienced a floating loss of $21 million before closing the position at a profit. Currently, the address holds a substantial short position in ETH, valued at $80 million.

data.title: ECB Official Highlights Impact of Weaker Dollar on Inflation and Interest Rates
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is closely monitoring the effects of a weakening dollar on inflation, which could influence future interest rate decisions. According to ChainCatcher, ECB Governing Council member François Villeroy de Galhau emphasized the potential impact of the dollar's depreciation on inflationary pressures. This development is being considered as the ECB evaluates its monetary policy strategies.

data.title: Former PayPal president: Bitcoin price should rise to $1.5 million
data.description: Former PayPal president David Marcus believes Bitcoin's price should reach $1.5 million and that this will happen. (Bitcoin Magazine)
